changes.detail: All five mandatory fields present and valid. work_id=LC-S1-ANALYTICAL-HARDENING, branch=feature/lc-s1-analytical-hardening, risk_level=HIGH, execution_model=TWO_PHASE_START_FINISH, change_type=MIXED. HIGH is correct — root_cause_compiler_v1.py is Intelligence Core per SOP §3. MIXED is correct — WHY asset authoring (CONTENT) is consumed by root_cause_compiler_v1.py which emits structured reasoning (BEHAVIOUR); MIXED is therefore required per SOP §4.2. TWO_PHASE_START_FINISH is required — HIGH-risk sprint with kernel start/finish lifecycle.

Q-2 active token (work_package_active.json) is currently held as of hardening time. Prompt now includes an explicit operational precondition at lines 36-39 directing Cursor to stop if Q-2 remains active. Cursor must verify token match at Stage 4 before modifying any files. This is an operational pre-condition, not a prompt authoring defect — prompt correctly encodes it.

Closed gate pack confirmed. All nine decisions are CLOSED 2026-05-09. §3.1 approves the bounded signal slice: signal_homocysteine_elevation_context (lead), signal_homocysteine_high, signal_mcv_high, signal_apoa1_cardio_risk, signal_ldl_high, signal_alp_low, signal_hypercortisolism. This is the only authority for the approved signal list. No duplicate authority source exists.
_ROOT_CAUSE_TARGETS registry read in full. 35 registered signal WHY loaders. Intelligence Core component confirmed. Sprint 1 WHY additions must be made here.

Fallback string confirmed: 'No hypothesis set available for this concern in v1.' — this is the user-visible gap Sprint 1 must eliminate for the approved slice. Consumption logic at lines 537-543 is deterministic and unchanged by this sprint.

Loader module confirmed present. New loader functions for signal_homocysteine_high, signal_mcv_high, signal_hypercortisolism (and conditionally signal_apoa1_cardio_risk) must be added here and registered in root_cause_compiler_v1.py _ROOT_CAUSE_TARGETS.

Three approved-slice signals already have governed WHY coverage: (1) signal_homocysteine_elevation_context — loader load_hcy_hypotheses_v1 at line 73, KB package pkg_homocysteine_elevation_context/signal_library.yaml verified with full explanation block. (2) signal_ldl_cholesterol_high — loader load_ldl_cholesterol_high_hypotheses_v1 at line 80, pkg_s24_ldl_high_dyslipidaemia/signal_library.yaml verified with full explanation block. (3) signal_alp_low — loader load_alp_low_hypotheses_v1 at line 97, loader confirmed registered.

backend/tests/unit/test_signal_evaluator.py — all 32 determinism and override tests must pass
New regression tests required for newly registered signals per Acceptance Criterion 7
determinism_risks: WHY YAML authoring: hypotheses must be deterministic, medically grounded, and non-circular. Shallow or invented content would pass silently — mitigated by acceptance criterion 3 and regression tests.
Loader registration error: a mis-wired loader could break hypothesis rendering for that signal — mitigated by requirement for AB/VR proving runs to pass (AC 4).
signal_apoa1_cardio_risk: unsupported WHY authoring risk if registration is not grounded first — mitigated by Task C mandatory grounding instruction.
